title: ilex uraiensis var. formosae
intro: Ilex uraiensis var. formosae, also known as Taiwan holly, is a plant species that belongs to the Ilex genus, characterized by its evergreen leaves and red berries. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Taiwan holly include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
